title: tool_use 与 tool_result 的 ID 配对机制
title_en: The ID Pairing Between tool_use and tool_result

body.concept: Claude 可能在一次响应中发出多个 tool_use 请求，每个请求都有唯一的 id。你必须为每个请求返回一个 tool_result，通过 tool_use_id 字段精确配对。这是一个请求-响应配对协议。
body.analogy: 就像餐厅的点单系统：每道菜（tool_use）有一个唯一单号（id），厨房做完后必须把菜放在对应单号的托盘上（tool_result.tool_use_id），服务员才能把菜送到正确的桌子。如果单号搞混，菜就送错桌了。

body_en.concept: Claude may issue multiple tool_use requests in a single response, each with a unique id. You must return a tool_result for each, matched precisely via the tool_use_id field. This is a request-response pairing protocol.
body_en.analogy: Like a restaurant order system: each dish (tool_use) has a unique order number (id). The kitchen must place the finished dish on the tray matching that order number (tool_result.tool_use_id). If numbers get mixed up, dishes go to the wrong table.

diagram:
```
flowchart LR
    A([Claude]) --> B[tool_use id:A]
    A --> C[tool_use id:B]
    B --> D[Execute both tools]
    C --> D
    D --> E[tool_result id:A]
    D --> F[tool_result id:B]
    E --> G([Claude])
    F --> G
```
